forecast-period.text: Clear. Light winds.
Sunny. The chance of morning frost about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Clear. Light winds.

Sunny. The chance of frost in the north in the early morning. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then tending north to northeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Patchy smoke haze in the west. Light winds.

The chance of fog in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

The chance of fog in the early morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Clear. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of frost in the early morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog and frost near the eastern border in the morning. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Clear. Light winds.
Sunny. Areas of morning frost. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning frost in the east. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Clear. Light winds.

Sunny. Areas of morning frost. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly on and east of the ranges. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Clear. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon.
Sunny. Areas of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Sun protection 11:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Clear. Light winds.

Sunny. Areas of morning frost. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 1 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Clear. Light winds.

Sunny. Patches of morning frost. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Clear. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. Areas of morning frost. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. Areas of frost and the chance of fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
